title: hariota cylindrica
intro: Hariota cylindrica, also known as the cylindrical hairwort or cylindrical hair grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Eriocaulaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hariota cylindrica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Hariota cylindrica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
